testing_centers.notes: In-person test centers and online proctored (OnVUE)

id_requirements: One primary, government-issued ID with name, photo, and signature (passport, driver's license, national ID card). Name must match registration exactly.
exam_rules: No personal items, phones, or notes in testing area. Scratch paper provided by testing center. No breaks for most exams (unscheduled breaks allowed but timer continues). Online proctored: no second monitor, must be alone in room, no virtual machines or remote desktop.
renewal_options: Recertify by passing current version before expiry, or earn recertification credit via eligible AWS exam or training activities.
target_audience: System administrators in a cloud operations role
recommended_experience: 1 year of experience with deployment, management, networking, and security on AWS

prerequisites.description: 1–2 years of experience as a system administrator in an operations role
Experience in monitoring, logging, and troubleshooting
Knowledge of networking concepts (for example, DNS, TCP/IP, firewalls)
Ability to implement architectural requirements (for example, high availability, performance, capacity)
Minimum of 1 year of hands-on experience with AWS technology
Experience in deploying, managing, and operating workloads on AWS
Understanding of the AWS Well-Architected Framework
Hands-on experience with the AWS Management Console and the AWS CLI
Understanding of AWS networking and security services
Hands-on experience in implementing security controls and compliance requirements

retake_policy.notes: After first failed attempt: 14-day waiting period. After each subsequent failed attempt: additional 14-day waiting period. No limit on total attempts.

objectives.title: Implement metrics, alarms, and filters by using AWS monitoring and logging services
sub_objectives: Identify, collect, analyze, and export logs (for example, Amazon CloudWatch Logs, CloudWatch Logs Insights, AWS CloudTrail logs)
Collect metrics and logs by using the CloudWatch agent
Configure notifications (for example, Amazon Simple Notification Service [Amazon SNS], Service Quotas, CloudWatch alarms, AWS Health events)

objectives.title: Remediate issues based on monitoring and availability metrics
sub_objectives: Troubleshoot or take corrective actions based on notifications and alarms
Configure Amazon EventBridge rules to invoke actions
Use AWS Systems Manager Automation runbooks to take action based on AWS Config rules

official_study_resources.title: AWS Official Practice Exam (via Skill Builder)
AWS Skill Builder (free tier)
official_study_resources.notes: Free and paid digital training; subscription includes full practice exams
